project.name: Urbis-BeSt-Address-Brussels-compare-OSM
project.description: Comparison tool between official Brussels-Capital Region addresses (UrbIS/BeSt) and OpenStreetMap.

tags.description: House number used for matching with official data (UrbIS/BeSt).
Street name used for matching with official data.

Place name used as an address for matching.
Unique address identifier (UrbIS/BeSt) exported by the tool to facilitate integration.
Used to identify addresses officially absent or verified absent on the ground.
Used with not:addr:housenumber for verified absent addresses.
Used to identify addresses of demolished buildings, considered absent.
Used with was:addr:housenumber for addresses of demolished buildings.
Used to extract street names and variants to improve matching quality.
